text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 260 

PRE_ICL_LTCP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy Copay — One-Day Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using long term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files)
